title: Enable OneDrive/SharePoint Integration in the Desktop App
excerpt:

posts.author: Bailey_BMF (Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love to see full support for OneDrive and SharePoint integration within the monday.com desktop app.

Right now, when I try to access or attach OneDrive files, I get the message: “Not Supported on Desktop App.” This is frustrating, especially since I use monday.com primarily on desktop, and our entire team relies on Microsoft 365.

Having the ability to access, attach, or share OneDrive/SharePoint files directly from the desktop app would greatly improve our workflow and reduce the risk of working with outdated or duplicate documents. Currently, I have to upload my files every time there is a revision which breaks version control and slows down collaboration.

If we could simply link to our live documents or shared folders via OneDrive—just like on the web version—it would be a massive improvement for daily use, particularly for remote teams trying to stay synced.

Please consider bringing this functionality to the desktop app!

posts.author: talongi (Thomas P. Alongi)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! This is important to us … for the same reasons.
